name: cc-tools
description: Layer 2/5 of the cc-* harness — primitives. Small, project-agnostic skills you or the model reach for while working: /slap resets a stuck fix, /likec4 draws C4 architecture-as-code, /reminder pins one rule file as a hard constraint, plus cctreectl to map the project tree. Skills only, zero config. The primitives every layer above builds on.
